posts.author: YanivGershman (Yaniv Gershman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Today no option to create bank of templates per board, for example:

Tasks: New User
Sub-Task:

  • Buy 365 account license
  • Add to Groups
  • Buy Laptop
    and more 20 sub tasks

Today the only option is to create a group ‘Template’ there to create all tasks, and in any moment required any template is to duplicate and move to relevant groups

On task software must have the option on ‘New Task’ option to create task from templates

posts.author: Sydney_rain (Sydney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yaniv Gershman:

Buy Laptop

Hi Yaniv!

You can do this with automations. I know it is a little different than having templates, but they work really well. There are a couple of different ways to do the automation. I’ve recorded 2 different videos to show you how to create the automations.
Status Subitem Automations

Dropdown Subitem Automation
Please let me know if you have any questions!
